May 23, 2026 | University of Lagos, Lagos | Hybrid

Move From Potential to Structured and Purposeful Growth

The Growth Summit is a transformational leadership and entrepreneurship experience designed to help students, professionals, and entrepreneurs gain clarity, structure, and direction for their next level.

Why The Growth Summit

A carefully curated experience designed to provide the specific tools and connections you need to scale your impact.

Growth Strategy

Build a practical roadmap that moves you intentionally from your current level to your next.

Leadership Development

Develop the mindset, confidence, and strategic thinking required to lead yourself and others effectively.

Entrepreneurial Structure

Learn how to turn ideas into sustainable systems that drive long-term business growth.

Career Direction

Gain clarity on your path and position your skills strategically for real opportunities.

Community & Network

Surround yourself with ambitious minds, mentors, and collaborators who accelerate your growth.

The Growth Voices

An elite lineup of visionaries, builders, and strategists ready to show you the roadmap to your next level.

Schedule Overview

May 27, 2026 • High-Impact Single Day Programming

Check-in11:00 - 12:00

Red Carpet & Arrivals

Welcome reception, registration, and formal red carpet photography.

Main Stage12:00 - 13:00

Keynote & Panels

Opening address and high-impact panel discussions on strategic growth.

Deep Dive13:00 - 14:00

Masterclass & Breakouts

Intensive learning sessions focused on practical execution strategies.

Experience14:00 - 15:00

Fireside Chat & Storytelling

Intimate conversations with builders sharing their authentic journeys.

Connections15:00 - 16:00

Networking & Close

Structured networking to foster partnerships and final closing remarks.

Full day intensive programming • All times WAT (UTC+1)

150 Spots Remaining

Join the Movement

We believe growth should be accessible. This year, registration is free for all qualified attendees. Only 150 spots available.

150 spots left

Full Access Pass

Your all-access pass to the Growth Summit experience (In-person & Virtual).

FREE
  • 1-day conference access
  • All keynotes and panels
  • Networking lunch
  • VIP reserved seating
  • Exclusive networking opportunities
  • Conference materials & resources
  • Digital certificate of attendance
  • Post-event recording access

First come first served • Registration closes May 20
